title: atalantia dasycarpa
intro: Atalantia dasycarpa, also known as the 'Chinese bitter orange', is a species of plant in the family Rutaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Atalantia dasycarpa are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
